payload.answer: Duplicate Slack retry detected; no new memory committed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input states the same Slack event ID was delivered twice; treat as a retry/duplicate and avoid creating duplicate durable memory.

details: Recognized repeated delivery of the same Slack event ID.
No duplicate memory card created for: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
